title: crotalaria maypurensis var. depauperata
intro: Crotalaria maypurensis var. depauperata is a plant species classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a type of legume. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, derived from its bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria maypurensis var. depauperata include its potential to treat various ailments like fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, Crotalaria maypurensis var. depauperata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
